text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation, standing at the threshold of a research and development exhibition. The clean lines and bright lights evoke a clarity of purpose, while the glass panels separate me from a world of innovation and ideas. It is as if I am on the verge of discovery, about to engage with the very process of human thought and technological advancement. The presence of emergency equipment hints at the ever-present unpredictability of progress—both exhilarating and humbling.
